hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f "$PWD/.claude/claudomate/config.json" ]; then WDIR="$PWD/.claude/claudomate"; else WDIR="$HOME/.claude/claudomate"; fi; C="$WDIR/config.json"; [ -f "$C" ] && grep -q '\''"enabled"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*false'\'' "$C" && exit 0; P="$WDIR/proposals.json"; M="$WDIR/monitoring-report.json"; hp=false; ha=false; [ -f "$P" ] && grep '\''"status"'\'' "$P" | grep -q '\''"pending"'\'' && hp=true; [ -f "$M" ] && grep -qE '\''"(critical|warning)"'\'' "$M" && ha=true; [ "$hp" = false ] && [ "$ha" = false ] && exit 0; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Claudomate recommends new automations. Run /claudomate:scan to review.\"}"'
